header.location: Portland, OR (Open to Remote or Relocation)

summary: I'm Jamie—a curious, people-loving Strategic Program Manager who thrives on solving problems through data analysis, developing processes grounded in evidence, and collaborating with stakeholders to drive operational excellence. Expect me to always be seeking ways we can improve how work gets done—through human-centered, data-driven approaches.

bullets.text: Facilitate CEO/HR discovery and {cross|stakeholder interviews} to diagnose absenteeism drivers; analyze {data|leave data} to quantify costs
Design a year-round accountability structure to redesign engagement communications, targeting 5%+ absenteeism reduction
Manage end-to-end lifecycles for 20+ {prog|programs} and 10+ vendors, using {data|feedback loops} to optimize operations and vendor performance
Optimize {cross|cross-functional} processes and develop SOPs for 70+ staff, with documentation that reduced onboarding time by 75%
Collaborate with teams (Sales, Ops) and 8 vendors to launch 15+ educational programs, driving a 78% client conversion rate
Conduct needs assessments with 25+ global {cross|stakeholders}, resulting in 3 new programs best aligned with client needs
Led a manager effectiveness initiative, translating {data|feedback data} into actionable reports demonstrating impact on employee engagement
Analyzed 2,000+ employee experiences to amplify employee voice and guide C-suite decisions on satisfaction drivers
Provided consultations to improve strategic plans and internal training on DEI, Inclusive Leadership, and performance review
Improved {ex|employee experience} via 5 {cross|cross-functional} projects focusing on survey development, rewards & recognition, and L&D
Directed a Mergers & Acquisitions project, overseeing {cross|cross-functional stakeholders} and coordinating data migration
Streamlined onboarding processes across 3 global locations by conducting gap analyses and clarifying job responsibilities
Initiated a DEI pilot with an Inclusive Leadership workshop for 12 senior leaders, later expanded to 23 other global locations
Strengthened engagement via an HR newsletter and award-winning well-being initiatives, recognized among 1,000+ competitors
Developed proficiency across various HR functions, ranging from recruitment and compensation to performance management
Filled a challenging international role by drafting job descriptions, posting openings, and researching global compensation details
Engaged global talent via personalized communication and customer service, increasing applications by 566% in 2 months
Organized recruiting events and moderated panels with C-suite at top 3 universities, reaching 230+ students and 80+ applicants

jd.meta: Accuris — Program Manager, NPI (Product Operations, Remote USA)

changeLog.note: Tailored for Accuris Program Manager NPI. Operations/PM + Tech Company recipes. Summary = Strategic Program Manager (drop extrovert). ODN Pair B (Facilitate/Redesign). InGenius = Set F blend with PM emphasis (end-to-end lifecycles, SOPs, cross-functional processes, 15+ launches). Vestas = M&A + gap analysis + onboarding streamlining. Skills = PM tools + Knowledge Mgmt + AI tools; HRCI dropped.
